1112141.content:
The day had not gone well for Yoshika.

Earlier, she and the 501st were ordered to scramble to intercept a Neuroi that was detected heading towards their Base. But after a few seconds in flight with her squadmates, her magic suddenly gave out and fell out of the sky towards the ocean. Thankfully, she had been saved by Lynnette but had to be returned to the base while the rest of the Squadron took out the encroaching Neuroi.

After a visit to the Base's doctor, Yoshika and Lynnette explained on the issue that her magic had not fully recovered. Specifically: her magic pressure is still a problem ever since she regained her Magic back in Gallia.

With this, she is effectively grounded for the time being until her magic could recover enough to last her for a while in a combat situation.

While Yoshika and most of the 501st mingled, Lynnette had gone out into the nearby forest. She later returned carrying an old ("weird" in the words of Shirley) pot that she had stumbled upon somewhere in the middle of the forest, where she, along with Yoshika, Shizuka, Shirley, Lucchini, and Perrine gathered around the object in the briefing room and discussed what this pot even is.

"Hmm, I can't see anything inside..." Yoshika muttered as she picked the pot up and tried to peer into the rather small hole.

"It does look very old doesn't it?" Shizuka observed while Lucchini whined near her wanting to look into the pot herself.

Unfortunately, the young energetic Romagna Witch may have gotten too excited when she, out of nowhere, jumped to grab the pot after Yoshika lowered her grip a bit, only to accidentally cause the pot to fly out of Yoshika's hands and into the air!

But when it came back down and hit the table, it suddenly split in two and something flew out of it from the impact! Without thinking, Yoshika quickly stepped forward and managed to catch the object before it hit the floor. After a brief sigh of relief, Yoshika lifted the object in her hands for everyone in the room to see.

Shizuka was the first to comment with some confusion, "Is... that a Clay Doll?"

Indeed, in Yoshika's hands is an odd-looking Doll made entirely out of clay. And it certainly looked to be a female doll due to the 'size' of the chest.

Lucchini laughed when she noticed this, "Hey look, Perrine! It's got bigger boobs than you!"

Said Gallian Witch looked absolutely incensed, "Don't say something so embarrassing! And Miyafuji, STOP RUBBING THAT THING THAT WAY!!"

Yoshika was indeed rubbing the 'breasts' of the doll with her index fingers out of curiosity (and because she is a boob pervert). Much to most of the other occupant Witches embarrassment, especially Lynnette as she blushed at what Yoshika is doing.

The Fuso girl snapped out of her trance after Perrine's outburst at her and finally noticed some of the stares, "Eh? Um! Uh... I was just-!"

But she was interrupted when the 'eyes' of the doll opened with a flash Then Yoshika suddenly dropped the doll and fell to her knees as she wrapped her arms around her chest in pain!

Everyone was taken aback by this sudden change of events and began to worry.

"Miyafuji?!"

"Yoshika?"

"Are you okay?!"

Said Fuso Witch did not immediately respond as she gritted her teeth as the pain continued to get worse and worse, "... my chest..."

Some of the girls (especially Lynnette and Shizuka) wanted to rush over, but they stopped themselves when Yoshika suddenly arched back and screamed in agony. But then after a couple of seconds, the pain seemingly subsided, and Yoshika slumped over panting heavily to catch her breath before standing up again.

"What... what was that?"

But when Yoshika turned her gaze back onto the other Witches, her expression turned to confusion when she saw that they all had looks of shock and disbelief.

"Um... what's wrong everyone?"

Shizuka and Shirley were the first ones to struggle to reply respectively,

"M-Miyafuji..."

"Oi... your breasts..."

Yoshika raised an eyebrow at the last one from Shirley, "My breasts?"

The moment after she parroted, however, Yoshika finally noticed that there was a bit of... weight on her chest. And when she looked down, her eyes widened at the sight of her bulging clothes because of her now two very big, melon-sized breasts!

"What the?!" Yoshika exclaimed as she blushed in embarrassment when her new large assets bounced up and down from her making even the slightest movement.

But was that the only physical change she and the other gathered Wiches noticed?
1112141.title: Yoshika Go Boing-Boing

info.brief_description: Grow any of the girls from the Strike Witches universe!
info.description:
Greetings!
This is a Growth Interactive for the Strike Witches series!

https://worldwitches.fandom.com/wiki/World_Witches_Series_Wiki

But to put it simply; The series revolves around teenage girls who use machines attached to their legs to do aerial combat against an alien race(?) called the Neuroi on an alternate Earth during the time of World War II.

Now keep in mind, the names of the nations are completely different from our Earth (more so with one particular nation with the continent(s) it is from looking completely different);

RL - Strike Witches World

Japan - Fuso
Britain - Britannia
France - Gallia
Germany - Karlsland
Finland - Suomus
Russia - Orussia
Italy - Romagna
America (U.S.A.) - Liberion
And several others that I won't bother to list here.

This is just a heads up if you're going to mention the Witch(es) home country.



-Rules-

1. The main focus is on making the girls Grow; so anything goes! Whether it be making them Giantess's or making their breasts/butts/or overall body, to expand, etc, etc, that's all up to you.

2. This means; no shrinking, only focus on making the girl(s) getting bigger!

3. Clothes DO NOT grow with the characters for whatever reason.

4. No male growth of any sort, okay?

5A. There's no limit to how big the girls can get, but please; whether you go slow medium, or fast, make the growth/expansions or whatever as detailed as possible. So no instant growth, period!

5B. This also applies to any additions added; make the whole chapter detailed and not too short. Prefer it to be at least a paragraph, but I will allow short chapters if it is used for adding different choices.

6. If you're going to end a plotline, don't end a story too soon, please...

7A. While this is sort of becomes redundant, please don't make the characters too OOC. (IE; character(s) that clearly do not like what's happening to her/them, or at first was okay but changes her/their mind later.)

7B. The only exception of going a bit OOC is unless it affects them mentally in some way. (So unless her/their minds are affected basically. Like in a certain episode of the Third Season of the Strike Witches anime)

8. No Toilet stuff.

9. Destruction and (if going Giantess) Vore are allowed, but again; keep in mind the character's personality. Such as if a character does not want to cause destruction; accidental/unintentional ones are allowed.

10. Please use good grammar or at the very least be readable.

11. Sexual is allowed, just don't go too much into the fine details.

12. When it comes to this particular series, Please do not do something as arbitrary as changing the 'race' of the girl(s) of all things! The main focus is the growth/expansion only!

13. I reserve the right to edit (fix) or remove any chapter(s)

And that is all.
Please enjoy.


***12/18/20 Update

I'm going to retcon Rule number 2. a bit. While shrinking is still not allowed, I will make an exception if there is to be a moment or even ending with "happy ending" cases. Such as any character growing Giantess can shrink back down, or just reverting to normal overall

Rule

14. Character deaths are allowed. But again, please keep in mind to rules 7A. & 7B. when it comes to going OOC.
